subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! During this period numerous letters have been received from you, all of which gathered in Port Said [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم نامه های متعدده در اینمدت از شما رسیده که جمیع در پورتسعید جمع
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
